1. The styles-mv base interface (IStylesMvBase or similar)
2. The styles-mv model (StylesMvModel)
3. Any DTO files in that directory

content.text: I'll search for and read the styles-mv related files in that directory.

1→import { Transform } from 'class-transformer';
     2→import {
     3→	IsArray,
     4→	IsBoolean,
     5→	IsInt,
     6→	IsNotEmpty,
     7→	IsNumber,
     8→	IsOptional,
     9→	IsString,
    10→	IsUUID,
    11→} from 'class-validator';
    12→
    13→import {
    14→	IStylesMvColor,
    15→	IStylesMvPrice,
    16→} from '@modules/db/styles-mv/types/styles-mv.base.interface';
    17→
    18→export class BaseStylesMvDto {
    19→	@IsUUID()
    20→	@IsNotEmpty()
    21→	_id: string;
    22→
    23→	@IsInt()
    24→	@IsNotEmpty()
    25→	style_id: number;
    26→
    27→	@IsInt()
    28→	@IsNotEmpty()
    29→	product_id: number;
    30→
    31→	@IsOptional()
    32→	@IsString()
    33→	name: string | null;
    34→
    35→	@IsOptional()
    36→	@IsString()
    37→	decoration_method: string | null;
    38→
    39→	@IsOptional()
    40→	@IsString()

    42→
    43→	@IsOptional()
    44→	@IsString()
    45→	general_comments: string | null;
    46→
    47→	@IsOptional()
    48→	@IsString()
    49→	manufacturer: string | null;
    50→
    51→	@IsOptional()
    52→	@IsInt()
    53→	minimum_quantity: number | null;
    54→
    55→	@IsOptional()
    56→	@IsInt()
    57→	rating_count: number | null;
    58→
    59→	@IsOptional()
    60→	@IsNumber()
    61→	@Transform(({ value }: { value: unknown }) => {
    62→		if (value === null || value === undefined) return null;
    63→		const num = Number(value);
    64→		return isNaN(num) ? null : num;
    65→	})
    66→	rating_score: number | null;
    67→
    68→	@IsOptional()
    69→	@IsArray()
    70→	sizes: string[] | null;
    71→
    72→	@IsString()
    73→	@IsNotEmpty()
    74→	status: string;
    75→
    76→	@IsOptional()
    77→	@IsString()
    78→	style_type: string | null;
    79→
    80→	@IsOptional()
    81→	@IsInt()
    82→	price_level: number | null;
    83→
    84→	@IsOptional()
    85→	@IsInt()
    86→	primary_category_id: number | null;
    87→
    88→	@IsOptional()
    89→	@IsString()
    90→	primary_category_name: string | null;
    91→
    92→	@IsOptional()
    93→	@IsString()
    94→	product_type: string | null;
    95→
    96→	@IsOptional()
    97→	@IsString()
    98→	style_card_image_url: string | null;
    99→
   100→	@IsOptional()
   101→	@IsArray()
   102→	broad_category_names: string[] | null;
   103→
   104→	@IsOptional()
   105→	@IsArray()
   106→	sub_category_names: string[] | null;
   107→
   108→	@IsOptional()
   109→	@IsInt()
   110→	turn_time: number | null;
   111→
   112→	@IsOptional()

   114→	rush_turn_time: number | null;
   115→
   116→	@IsBoolean()
   117→	@Transform(({ value }: { value: unknown }) => {
   118→		return value === 1 || value === '1' || value === true;
   119→	})
   120→	no_minimum: boolean;
   121→
   122→	@IsOptional()

1→import {
     2→	ArrayNotEmpty,
     3→	IsArray,
     4→	IsInt,
     5→	IsString,
     6→	Max,
     7→	MaxLength,
     8→	Min,
     9→} from 'class-validator';
    10→
    11→export class FindByBrandsDto {
    12→	@IsArray()
    13→	@ArrayNotEmpty()
    14→	@IsString({ each: true })
    15→	@MaxLength(40, { each: true })
    16→	brands: string[];
    17→
    18→	@IsInt()
    19→	@Min(1)
    20→	@Max(1000)
    21→	limit: number;
    22→}
    23→
